name: qalma-bundle-size-bench
description: Reproducible bundle-size benchmark: tree-shaken, minified, gzipped payload that each Angular rich-text editor adds to an app bundle (Angular itself excluded).

scripts.bench: cd ../.. && pnpm nx build editor && cd bench/bundle-size && QALMA_LOCAL_DIST=../../dist/libs/editor QALMA_VERSION=0.1.0-beta.2 node build.mjs
